title: Fix implicit calls of base class constructors with optional arguments

features.name: class inheritance with optional argument constructor
features.description: Code should include a base class with a constructor that has an optional (default) argument, and a derived class that extends it without defining its own constructor

features.name: derived class constructor without super.new call
features.description: Code should include a derived class that defines a constructor but does not call super.new(), where the base class constructor has optional arguments
